The '''Ugnorgrad Swampway''' was a skimmer race course created on the artificial [[Ugnaught Surface/Legends|Ugnaught Surface]] in the atmosphere of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Based out of the city of [[Ugnorgrad/Legends|Ugnorgrad]], the [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[King/Legends|King]] [[Ozz (Ugnaught)/Legends|Ozz]] would host a biannual race along the Swampway, known as the [[Swampway 200]], during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Portions of the course ran through [[Grukk's Jungle]] and [[Phizbin Marsh]].<ref name="ActionTidings2" />
